description: baseline — 5 npm audit warnings (4 moderate, 1 high)
script-src allows unsafe-eval and unsafe-inline — weakens XSS protection
next/image remotePatterns allows hostname: '**' — server-side image proxy can reach internal services
Follow/unfollow lacks Zod validation — uses raw typeof check only
Mini app webhook has no HMAC verification — FID check only
In-memory rate limit store — not shared across instances, resets on restart
In-memory nonce stores — nonce generated on instance A can't be verified on instance B
No structured audit log — admin actions untraceable
Song submission DELETE lacks Zod validation on id field
isAdmin cached at login — revoking admin FID doesn't take immediate effect
x-forwarded-for header used for rate limiting — spoofable on some platforms
.env.example comment says 'skip verification' but code actually rejects — misleading
Vote weight based on current wallet — changeable between votes
5 npm audit findings: next CSRF/DoS, socket.io-parser, file-type
No dangerouslySetInnerHTML found — 0 XSS surface from direct injection
